scope: semantic fine-tune CLI and shell entrypoints

claim_boundary.purpose: auditable dry-run job specification surfaces only

validation.command: set PYTHONPATH=src&& python -B -m nlp_policy_nz.semantic.finetune --model-name nlpaueb/legal-bert-base-uncased --output-dir models/legal-bert-nz --batch-size 32 --learning-rate 2e-5 --hub-model-id nlp-policy-nz/legal-bert-nz --print-spec
validation.observed_boundary: JSON reported mode=dry_run, training_started=false, model_download_started=false, hub_push_started=false

validation.command: set PYTHONPATH=src&& python -B -m nlp_policy_nz.training.run_qlora --model-name google/gemma-3-9b --task citation --output-dir models/gemma-3-9b-citation --hub-model-id nlp-policy-nz/gemma-3-9b-citation --print-spec
bash -n scripts/finetune_legal_bert.sh scripts/finetune_gemma.sh scripts/finetune_phi4.sh scripts/finetune_qwen.sh scripts/finetune_mistral.sh

residual_external_gates: Provide real Parquet training inputs with raw_text for live MLM training
Validate CUDA/GPU runtime before production-scale training
Install and validate heavy training dependencies in the execution environment
Authenticate to Hugging Face before any hub push
Run held-out evaluation and publish model-card evidence before claiming tuned-model performance
